promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the prior A2-mid axis0 suite batch deferred this axis12 realization family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: pair identity, local-suite-versus-V4 admission, coarse edge partition versus full ordering, global sign directionality, fixed-snapshot-versus-grid-scan divergence, and the stable SEQ02 advantage.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The adjacent axis0 suite A2-mid batch provides the local-suite-versus-descendant seam style, the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern, and the axis0 trajectory A2-mid batch provides a nearby anti-collapse style for keeping coarse partitions weaker than stronger outcome claims.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it is the next residual pair and must stay outside this bounded axis12 realization pass.
Not selected because it would erase the local-suite-versus-descendant seam and the paired-family boundary preserved by the parent batch.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent axis12 realization batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable shell, descendant seam, edge-partition caution, sign directionality, surface-shape divergence, and stable local-best packet without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.name: AXIS12_REALIZATION_SUITE_PAIR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest shell for the fixed-parameter axis12 realization residual pair.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_SUITE_VS_V4_DESCENDANT_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest local-suite-versus-descendant admission seam under shared runner hash continuity.

candidate_items.name: EDGE_PARTITION_COARSE_CLASSIFIER_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest anti-overread packet between the coarse edge partition and stronger endpoint ordering claims.

candidate_items.name: GLOBAL_AXIS3_SIGN_DIRECTIONALITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest packet showing that the sign layer materially steers endpoints inside this axis12 family.

candidate_items.name: FIXED_SNAPSHOT_VS_GRIDSCAN_DESCENDANT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest anti-copy packet between the local fixed snapshot and the broader admitted V4 grid scan.

candidate_items.name: SEQ02_STABLE_LOCAL_BEST_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest local endpoint-order packet showing SEQ02's stable advantage beyond the coarse edge classes.

quarantined_items.name: LOCAL_SUITE_AS_REPOTOP_ADMITTED_VIA_SHARED_HASH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Shared runner hash is weaker than local-suite SIM_ID admission because the repo-held pack omits the local suite SIM_ID.

quarantined_items.name: EDGE_FLAGS_AS_FULL_ENDPOINT_ORDERING_MODEL
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The coarse edge partition is weaker than full endpoint ordering because sequences inside each edge class still diverge measurably.

quarantined_items.name: AXIS12_FAMILY_AS_PURELY_AXIS12_STRUCTURAL_WITHOUT_SIGN_LAYER
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Axis12 labeling is weaker than an absence-of-sign claim because sign +1 improves endpoints across all sequences.

quarantined_items.name: V4_AS_RENAMED_COPY_OF_LOCAL_SNAPSHOT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The admitted V4 descendant is a grid scan rather than a renamed copy of the local fixed snapshot.

quarantined_items.name: ADJACENT_HARDEN_RUNNERS_AS_CURRENT_PAIRED_BATCH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Raw adjacency is weaker than paired-family membership because the harden surfaces remain runner-only residuals.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the axis12 realization batch without reopening raw sims files.

They keep pair identity, descendant admission seam, edge-partition caution, sign directionality, surface-shape divergence, and the stable SEQ02 local-best packet distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain admission-overreads, ordering-overreads, sign-erasure overreads, copy-overreads, or residual-class overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
